tasks.description: Wake on each immutable official review publication.
tasks.completion_predicate: Every official review is queued exactly once in arrival order.

tasks.description: Run transient non-publishing response workers for available review threads.
tasks.completion_predicate: Each worker draft is thread-bound, evidence-referenced, transient, and non-publishing.

tasks.description: Merge all weaknesses and questions into the coordinator-owned response matrix.
tasks.completion_predicate: Every official weakness and key question has one response row and duplicate concerns are linked.

tasks.description: Reject invented evidence, attacks, worker publication, and cross-thread contradictions.
tasks.completion_predicate: Checker passes every thread and all coordinator commitments are consistent.

tasks.description: Publish one immutable rebuttal per official review as the persistent coordinator.
tasks.completion_predicate: All review threads have schema-valid published rebuttals and are settled.
